lines.text: Since 1944 there have been experimental weapons which should now
be in production. The one about which there has been so much discussion
is a V-Weapon which has a disc-like round body, about 48.50 metres in
diameter and has by way of emission 45 to 50 automatic -------- (wor
not legible). With the setting off of the disc these rotate around a sens
plexi-glass sphere in the center in which are located the -------- (word
not legible) and guiding apparatus for distance flights. Inside the spher
there is also enough space for high explosive atom bombs. These weapons
-------- ------ (not legibl) and show an effective range
from 30 to 35,000 kilometres. V-Weapon Konstrus (Technician?) Riedel (or
Riedet), Germany, says it is a typical V-Weapon on which he himself worked
"I am positive that the truth is better than keeping t[unclear]le
This letter is written apparently by a not highly litera[unclear]
undeveloped handwriting. It is my opinion that he is [unclear]
